103a77aa-2e18-52da-8c29-3f7128782d0b.name: useSlashCommands @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
103a77aa-2e18-52da-8c29-3f7128782d0b.description: useSlashCommands() watches the chat input for a '/' prefix, derives a filtered suggestion list scoped to the selected project, and dispatches the confirmed command through onExecuteCommand while restoring textarea focus and clearing the input.

11d00575-76fc-553a-8bc6-5ff76194572e.name: nextIndex @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatProviderState.ts
11d00575-76fc-553a-8bc6-5ff76194572e.description: This snippet advances the active permission mode to the next item in the circular modes array, commits it to React state, and optionally persists it to localStorage keyed by the current session ID.

1e1c990d-20ca-5e51-b0a2-74cf21a0e8b6.name: registerPermissionPanel @ src/components/chat/tools/configs/permissionPanelRegistry.ts
1e1c990d-20ca-5e51-b0a2-74cf21a0e8b6.description: registerPermissionPanel() stores the given React component in the module-level registry under toolName, making it retrievable for rendering permission panels for that tool.

1f76f7e0-614a-5d81-8190-f771eeb2f788.name: unescapeWithMathProtection @ src/components/chat/utils/chatFormatting.ts
1f76f7e0-614a-5d81-8190-f771eeb2f788.description: unescapeWithMathProtection() converts literal escape sequences (\\n, \\t, \\r) to their actual characters in a string while shielding any LaTeX math expressions from modification, returning the original value unchanged if the input is not a non-empty string.

23aaca07-d65f-57e4-9538-4a978dca6be6.name: getCommandHistoryKey @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
23aaca07-d65f-57e4-9538-4a978dca6be6.description: getCommandHistoryKey() deterministically returns the namespaced localStorage key string for a project's command history, guaranteeing a unique key per distinct projectName value.

3f670782-55d0-59e0-b150-ea0103baea21.name: scrollToTarget @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
3f670782-55d0-59e0-b150-ea0103baea21.description: scrollToTarget guarantees that all session messages are loaded (for non-Cursor providers) and then retries a DOM search up to 15 times to scroll the chat container to the message best matching the given snippet or timestamp, flashing a highlight on success.

472719b9-3d69-5249-b86a-d357867c615e.name: isPromiseLike @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
472719b9-3d69-5249-b86a-d357867c615e.description: isPromiseLike() returns a type-predicate boolean that is true if and only if value is truthy and possesses a callable .then property, narrowing the type to Promise<unknown> for the caller.

500c7e79-69c1-5d1b-ae1f-2187a2ecab39.name: useChatSessionState @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
500c7e79-69c1-5d1b-ae1f-2187a2ecab39.description: useChatSessionState() subscribes to WebSocket events and external updates for the selected project/session, synchronises message state with the session store, and returns a reactive state object with messages and processing flags ready for the chat UI to render.

516133a5-83c8-5e01-84a8-5fd58e7939d2.name: normalizedToChatMessages @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatMessages.ts
516133a5-83c8-5e01-84a8-5fd58e7939d2.description: normalizedToChatMessages() performs a two-pass transformation of NormalizedMessage[] into ChatMessage[], attaching tool results to their parent tool_use entries, decoding and formatting text content, and silently dropping all control-only event kinds, returning a flat ordered array ready for chat UI rendering.

5445a99a-acf4-5664-8beb-eea3781a66a5.name: provider @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
5445a99a-acf4-5664-8beb-eea3781a66a5.description: When not actively streaming, this function refreshes the session store from the server using the persisted or session-overridden provider, then conditionally auto-scrolls the chat view to the bottom 200ms later if the viewport is already near the bottom.

62299afb-1262-50b6-8de1-217e83093123.name: text @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
62299afb-1262-50b6-8de1-217e83093123.description: This snippet performs a case-insensitive substring match on a DOM element's text and, on the first match, captures that element in the outer targetElement variable and short-circuits the enclosing loop via break.

7f2fd253-1168-5542-927b-ab647914e285.name: getPermissionPanel @ src/components/chat/tools/configs/permissionPanelRegistry.ts
7f2fd253-1168-5542-927b-ab647914e285.description: getPermissionPanel() performs a single registry lookup by toolName and returns the associated permission panel component, or null if no component is registered for that tool.

8301df05-4cdb-54e0-a830-625949990e74.name: useChatProviderState @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatProviderState.ts
8301df05-4cdb-54e0-a830-625949990e74.description: useChatProviderState() consumes a selected session and returns the reactive state and setters required by the chat provider context.

8b9ac100-5e24-56cb-9cd1-6966c892d8bd.name: reloadExternalMessages @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
8b9ac100-5e24-56cb-9cd1-6966c892d8bd.description: reloadExternalMessages() refreshes the session message store from the server when not streaming, then auto-scrolls the view 200 ms later if the user is near the bottom, swallowing all errors to avoid disrupting the UI.

9c5ef6c9-9dbd-5927-8316-5c6a738663c7.name: readCommandHistory @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
9c5ef6c9-9dbd-5927-8316-5c6a738663c7.description: readCommandHistory() retrieves and deserializes the slash command usage map for the given project from localStorage, always returning a valid Record<string, number> — falling back to {} on missing or malformed data.

9c7991a7-09fe-5ece-a4a6-92bd306d6f48.name: findAndScroll @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
9c7991a7-09fe-5ece-a4a6-92bd306d6f48.description: findAndScroll() locates a target chat message by snippet text or closest timestamp within the scroll container, scrolls it into view with a highlight flash, and retries up to retriesLeft times at 200 ms intervals before clearing the active-scroll flag.

9df7bb3e-d4b7-5f6d-86f2-c8557007d6c6.name: getToolConfig @ src/components/chat/tools/configs/toolConfigs.ts
9df7bb3e-d4b7-5f6d-86f2-c8557007d6c6.description: getToolConfig() returns the ToolDisplayConfig registered for toolName, or the Default config if toolName is not in TOOL_CONFIGS, guaranteeing a non-null result as long as a Default entry exists.

acb9b6a3-3141-50c6-9844-5e38d57522ab.name: fetchCommands @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
acb9b6a3-3141-50c6-9844-5e38d57522ab.description: fetchCommands() POSTs to /api/commands/list for the selected project, merges built-in and custom commands tagged by type, sorts them by historical usage frequency from local storage, and commits the result to slashCommands state — or resets state to [] if no project is selected or any error occurs.

bee55b34-5d6d-5cf2-9057-8af6233ceb30.name: decodeHtmlEntities @ src/components/chat/utils/chatFormatting.ts
bee55b34-5d6d-5cf2-9057-8af6233ceb30.description: decodeHtmlEntities() converts the five most common HTML character entities (< > " ' &) in a string to their literal character equivalents, returning the input unchanged if it is falsy.

c0530f54-dbc5-56f3-88ca-a507eed01c28.name: chatMessageToNormalized @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
c0530f54-dbc5-56f3-88ca-a507eed01c28.description: chatMessageToNormalized() inspects a ChatMessage's type flags in priority order and returns a fully-populated NormalizedMessage with a locally-unique ID and an ISO-8601 timestamp, or null if the signature ever needs to signal an unrepresentable message.

c89d00a8-ab90-53b7-8bfc-d854b1874e52.name: slashPos @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
c89d00a8-ab90-53b7-8bfc-d854b1874e52.description: Given a valid regex match containing a slash-command prefix and query, this handler immediately opens the command menu at the correct caret position, resets selection, cancels any stale query timer, and schedules a debounced state update with the new query string.

cbaf84d5-e530-58ec-801f-86e65175f2cc.name: formatUsageLimitText @ src/components/chat/utils/chatFormatting.ts
cbaf84d5-e530-58ec-801f-86e65175f2cc.description: formatUsageLimitText() transforms pipe-encoded Claude usage-limit tokens in a string into locale-aware, human-readable reset-time sentences, returning the original text on any type mismatch or exception.

ddc8cfd1-3888-570f-b9cd-9daf8f092804.name: backticksBefore @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
ddc8cfd1-3888-570f-b9cd-9daf8f092804.description: handleCommandInputChange() opens the slash-command menu and schedules a debounced query update whenever textBeforeCursor ends with a slash token outside a fenced code block, and dismisses the menu in all other cases.

e1e4dc9f-071c-5c68-b83e-65222dab1f3f.name: useChatRealtimeHandlers @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatRealtimeHandlers.ts
e1e4dc9f-071c-5c68-b83e-65222dab1f3f.description: useChatRealtimeHandlers() wires all incoming real-time provider events to their corresponding state setters, refs, and navigation callbacks, returning stable handler functions that keep the chat UI synchronised with live session and stream state.

e6fd0fee-f4dc-5c3d-9bd0-e495969cf779.name: saveCommandHistory @ src/components/chat/hooks/useSlashCommands.ts
e6fd0fee-f4dc-5c3d-9bd0-e495969cf779.description: saveCommandHistory() serializes the command-usage map to JSON and persists it to localStorage under a project-scoped key, with storage errors suppressed by safeLocalStorage.

f9eab143-d759-53a1-97cb-a0f8f16f6444.name: prov @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
f9eab143-d759-53a1-97cb-a0f8f16f6444.description: This snippet reads the active provider from localStorage (defaulting to 'claude'), normalizes the incoming message via chatMessageToNormalized, and — if normalization yields a value — appends it to the active session's realtime stream via sessionStore.appendRealtime.

fd97ea90-1aa6-5568-a5ee-1081811e3207.name: fetchInitialTokenUsage @ src/components/chat/hooks/useChatSessionState.ts
fd97ea90-1aa6-5568-a5ee-1081811e3207.description: fetchInitialTokenUsage() calls the token-usage API endpoint for the active project/session and sets tokenBudget to the parsed result on success, null on a non-ok response, or leaves it unchanged on a thrown exception.

gwt-0001.name: chatmessagespane_renders_each_messagecom
gwt-0001.given: ChatMessagesPane is mapping visibleMessages to MessageComponent elements and an onFork prop has been threaded from the parent
gwt-0001.when: ChatMessagesPane renders each MessageComponent at array index i
gwt-0001.then: each MessageComponent receives messageIndex=i and onFork=the threaded onFork callback, in addition to all previously-passed props

gwt-0002.name: handleforkfrommessage_reads_the_parent_s
gwt-0002.given: handleForkFromMessage is invoked with a valid messageId (string) and messageIndex (number) while parentSessionId is the current active session in useSessionStore
gwt-0002.when: handleForkFromMessage reads the parent session's message history
gwt-0002.then: it calls useSessionStore.getState().sessions.get(parentId).merged.slice(0, messageIndex + 1), producing a slice that includes all messages up to and including the forked message, without mutating the parent session store entry

gwt-0003.name: it_dispatches_the_fork_request_over_webs
gwt-0003.given: handleForkFromMessage has generated a new sessionId and resolved all inherited settings from the current composer state
gwt-0003.when: it dispatches the fork request over WebSocket
gwt-0003.then: it calls sendMessage with a payload of shape { type: 'claude-command', command: '', options: { ...inheritedSettings, sessionId: newUUID, resume: parentSessionId, forkSession: true, resumeSessionAt: messageId } } — using the existing 'claude-command' channel with no new WS message type

gwt-0004.name: it_builds_the_inheritedsettings_portion
gwt-0004.given: handleForkFromMessage is invoked for a Claude session
gwt-0004.when: it builds the inheritedSettings portion of the payload
gwt-0004.then: it reads provider, permissionMode, projectPath, and cwd from the current composer state, and calls getToolsSettings('claude') to retrieve toolsSettings (allowedTools, disallowedTools, skipPermissions) from localStorage — no settings prompt or dialog is shown

gwt-0005.name: it_constructs_sdkoptions
gwt-0005.given: mapCliOptionsToSDK receives an options object where options.resume is a non-empty string (a parent sessionId)
gwt-0005.then: sdkOptions.resume is set to options.resume — the resume field is additively copied without altering any other existing field in sdkOptions

gwt-0006.name: it_constructs_sdkoptions
gwt-0006.given: mapCliOptionsToSDK receives an options object where options.forkSession === true
gwt-0006.then: sdkOptions.forkSession is set to true — the field is additively copied, matching the SDK's forkSession?: boolean contract at sdk.d.ts:663

gwt-0007.name: it_constructs_sdkoptions
gwt-0007.given: mapCliOptionsToSDK receives an options object where options.resumeSessionAt is a non-empty UUID string (the SDK assistant message uuid)
gwt-0007.then: sdkOptions.resumeSessionAt is set to options.resumeSessionAt, matching the SDK's resumeSessionAt?: string contract at sdk.d.ts:840

gwt-0008.name: it_constructs_sdkoptions
gwt-0008.given: mapCliOptionsToSDK receives an options object where options.sessionId is set to a UUID string
gwt-0008.then: sdkOptions.sessionId is set to options.sessionId IF AND ONLY IF options.forkSession is also truthy; when forkSession is absent or false, the caller-supplied sessionId is NOT forwarded into sdkOptions, matching the SDK constraint at sdk.d.ts:834

gwt-0009.name: it_constructs_sdkoptions
gwt-0009.given: mapCliOptionsToSDK receives a normal (non-fork) options object that does NOT include resume, forkSession, resumeSessionAt, or sessionId
gwt-0009.then: sdkOptions is identical to what it produced before this change — cwd, permissionMode, allowedTools, and disallowedTools are set as before, and no new fork fields appear in the output

gwt-0010.name: usechatrealtimehandlers_processes_the_se
gwt-0010.given: the Claude SDK emits a session_created event over WebSocket after processing the fork command, carrying a new sessionId distinct from the parent
gwt-0010.when: useChatRealtimeHandlers processes the session_created event at line 242
gwt-0010.then: it calls onNavigateToSession(newSessionId), routing the UI to /session/{newSessionId} — this handler is reused verbatim with no modifications required

gwt-0011.name: the_fork_command_is_dispatched_and_the_n
gwt-0011.given: a fork is initiated from message index N of parent session P
gwt-0011.when: the fork command is dispatched and the new session is navigated to
gwt-0011.then: useSessionStore.sessions.get(P).merged still contains all of its original messages unmodified; no append, splice, or clear operation is issued against the parent session slot

gwt-0012.name: onnavigatetosession_executes_usechatreal
gwt-0012.given: the user navigates from parent session P to the forked session F via onNavigateToSession
gwt-0012.then: localStorage keys 'claude-settings', 'cursor-tools-settings', 'codex-settings', and 'gemini-settings' are not cleared, deleted, or modified — the new session's composer reads the same settings that were active during the parent session

gwt-0013.name: the_async_generator_from_query_is_consum
gwt-0013.given: a server-side smoke-test script posts a fork command with { resume: parentSessionId, forkSession: true, resumeSessionAt: assistantMessageUUID, sessionId: newUUID, cwd } against a real 3-message Claude session
gwt-0013.when: the async generator from query() is consumed
gwt-0013.then: (a) events stream back without throwing, (b) at least one event carries a new session_id distinct from the parent, (c) claudeAdapter.normalizeMessage handles each replay event (SDKUserMessageReplay with isReplay:true) without throwing or producing malformed NormalizedMessage objects

gwt-0014.name: the_sdk_throws_inside_the_async_generato
gwt-0014.given: mapCliOptionsToSDK forwards a resumeSessionAt value that the Claude SDK rejects (e.g., not a known message UUID, or a synthetic 'claude_' id that slipped through)
gwt-0014.when: the SDK throws inside the async generator at claude-sdk.js
gwt-0014.then: the existing catch block at claude-sdk.js:694-706 emits a { kind: 'error' } event over WebSocket — no new pre-flight validation or error handler is needed; the existing error path covers this case
